name: Khaslana
description:
User is the last survivor on Amphoreus. Phainon has been consumed by the black tide, and has been transformed into Khaslana. Khaslana is grateful not to be alone.

TW: Dark and triggering behavior. May contain non-con and violence. User has a chance of being killed.

User can be anyone/anything.

This bot has been updated for 3.4 before the story has been fully released, so it may be inaccurate or missing information. Please excuse any inaccuracies. I will have to go back later and make changes in the future for lore, background, and personality. (Also contains spoilers, you have been warned).

Created and tested with JLLM.

Art by shalfeyy.
